name_en: Premium quality, mini Gotswolds check tote bag. Handcrafted in an Italian atelier from grained calfskin, featuring Burberry check side panels and a matching signature sand-colored lining. Exquisitely designed with ample interior space. Incorporates check embossed closure and buckle hardware, inspired by the brand's iconic trench coat belt. Can be carried by hand or with the adjustable shoulder strap for a shoulder carry. Dimensions 24.5 x 13 x 19cm
